page.introText: This is my ongoing personal project to archive Islamic information, knowledge, history, language, and heritage in one calm, organized space. I am building it as a living collection that can grow over time through notes, timelines, reflections, and carefully structured resources.

cards.title: Prophets & Timelines
cards.description: Short guides to the lives, relationships, and historical order of the prophets named in the Qur'an.

cards.title: Names & Meanings
cards.description: A place for the names of surahs, key Arabic terms, and symbolic meanings that can be expanded later.

cards.title: Duas & Remembrance
cards.description: Daily duas, dhikr, short reflections, and context notes for practical spiritual grounding.

cards.title: Qur'anic Themes
cards.description: Connections between recurring themes: mercy, patience, justice, gratitude, repentance, and trust in Allah.

cards.title: Arabic Essentials
cards.description: Foundational Arabic vocabulary and phrase-boundary notes for reading with better understanding.

cards.title: Reflections Archive
cards.description: A calm card space for future notes, mini essays, summaries, and personal learning checkpoints.
